{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Ziel's Remnant
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel's Remnant]] is a hulking, horned creature with a deep green body and massive fists.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
